channel.title: Alexandria - Kang Ifaz – Learn Python
channel.description: Recent content in Learn Python on Alexandria - Kang Ifaz

item.title: Fundamentals Python
item.description:
🐍 Overview

The fundamentals are your entry point into Python programming, laying the groundwork for more advanced topics.

🧩 What You’ll Learn:

  • Basic Syntax & Data Types: Variables, arithmetic operations, and input/output.
  • Control Structures: Decision-making (conditionals) and iterative processes (loops).
  • Functions & Modules: Modular programming, reusable code, and organizing your programs.

Mastering these basics is essential for progressing to more advanced Python concepts.

item.title: Intermediate Python
item.description:
🚧 Overview

This intermediate level bridges the gap between Python fundamentals and advanced concepts.

🔧 What You’ll Learn:

  • Data Structures: Efficiently store and manipulate data with lists, dictionaries, and sets.
  • Object-Oriented Programming (OOP): Develop structured, reusable, and maintainable code.
  • File Handling & Exceptions: Manage files and handle errors gracefully.

Building these skills prepares you for data analysis, web development, and more complex programming tasks.

item.title: Data Science
item.description:
📊 Overview

Data Science involves extracting meaningful insights from data. Python offers powerful libraries that simplify this process.

📌 What You’ll Learn:

  • NumPy: Numerical computations and efficient data manipulation.
  • Pandas: Data cleaning, filtering, and aggregation.
  • Visualization: Creating insightful visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn.

This knowledge is crucial for anyone aiming to analyze data professionally and efficiently visualize their findings.

item.title: API & Machine Learning
item.description:
📘 Overview

In this section, you’ll explore advanced topics in Python, specifically APIs (Application Programming Interfaces) and Machine Learning.

🚀 What You’ll Learn:

  • Understanding and consuming REST APIs using Python.
  • Fundamental concepts of Machine Learning (Supervised & Unsupervised Learning).
  • Building and evaluating Machine Learning models using Scikit-Learn.
  • Introduction to Deep Learning frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch.

This knowledge enables you to build intelligent applications that interact seamlessly with external data sources and perform sophisticated data analysis and predictions.
